content_body: The listing was exactly as advertised: a beautiful, well-maintained property in the heart of the city. The rental company was very responsive, and had the convenience of an app for you to ask questions, receive updates, or make requests. The check-in and check-out processes were easy and painless. I would highly recommend this property to anyone who wants to experience an Atlanta vacation in a lush, well-appointed home in the heart of the city - or someone who just needed a "staycation" like me!
title: "Beautiful, Well-Maintained Property"
